meta.game: Phoenix Suns at Oklahoma City Thunder

PHX.headline: Oklahoma City takes on Phoenix, seeks 13th straight home win
PHX.description: Phoenix Suns (44-36, seventh in the Western Conference) vs. Oklahoma City Thunder (64-17, first in the Western Conference)

PHX.headline: Phoenix Suns vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights
PHX.description: Phoenix Suns vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights

PHX.headline: LeBron James scores 28, leads Lakers past Suns 101-73 to clinch home-court advantage in 1st round
PHX.description: — LeBron James had 28 points, 12 assists and six rebounds, and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers clinched home-court advantage in the first round of the playoffs with their 101-73 victory over the Phoenix Suns on Friday night.

PHX.headline: LeBron drops 28 points, dishes 12 assists in Lakers' win
PHX.description: LeBron drops 28 points, dishes 12 assists in the Lakers' win over the Suns.

PHX.headline: Gillespie and the Suns visit conference foe Los Angeles
PHX.description: Phoenix Suns (44-36, seventh in the Western Conference) vs. Los Angeles Lakers (51-29, fourth in the Western Conference)

OKC.headline: Oklahoma City takes on Phoenix, seeks 13th straight home win
OKC.description: Phoenix Suns (44-36, seventh in the Western Conference) vs. Oklahoma City Thunder (64-17, first in the Western Conference)

OKC.headline: Nuggets win 11th straight, beating Thunder 127-107 in battle of reserves as playoffs approach
OKC.description: — Jonas Valanciunas had season highs of 23 points and 17 rebounds, and the Denver Nuggets beat the Oklahoma City Thunder 127-107 in a battle of reserves Friday night.

OKC.headline: Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights
OKC.description: Oklahoma City Thunder vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights

OKC.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
OKC.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

OKC.headline: NBA's most valuable players in 15 categories: Scoring, shooting, more
OKC.description: From best fadeaway to the MVP, Dean Oliver uses ESPN Analytics' Net Points metric to wrap up the season by handing out awards.
